workflow.name: RSVP Lead Scoring for Events with GPT, HubSpot & Slack
workflow.description:
# **RSVP Lead Scoring for Events with GPT, HubSpot & Slack**

**Who is this for?**
Event organizers, RevOps teams, sales managers, and marketers running conferences, webinars, or meetups who want to **automatically qualify RSVPs** and turn attendees into revenue opportunities.

---

**What problem is this workflow solving?**
RSVP lead qualification is manual and slow:

- Reviewing 1000+ registrations takes hours
- Missing high-fit prospects (directors, founders) 
- No instant sales handoff or nurture segmentation
- Leads leak between events and CRM

This workflow **auto-scores RSVPs 0-100** and routes high-fits to sales instantly.

---

**What this workflow does**

- **Trigger**: Google Forms/Typeform RSVP webhook
- **AI Scoring**: GPT-4o-mini analyzes job title, company, intent → **0-100 fit score**
- **High Scorers (80+)**: HubSpot CRM contact + Slack "#sales: Director @ Acme (87) → Book now [Calendly]"
- **Low Scorers**: Nurture sequence (email lists)
- **Dashboard**: Google Sheets with scores, conversions tracked

---

**Setup (3 minutes)**

- **Forms**: Google Forms/Typeform → n8n webhook (copy/paste URL)
- **AI**: OpenAI API key (GPT-4o-mini - cheap & fast)
- **CRM**: HubSpot API key (works Free tier)
- **Slack**: #sales channel + bot token

Fully configurable—no code changes needed.

---

**How to customize to your needs**

- **Scoring**: Adjust GPT thresholds (80→90 for enterprise)
- **CRM**: Swap HubSpot for Salesforce/Pipedrive
- **Channels**: Add Teams/Email + multiple Slack rooms
- **Events**: Multi-event scoring by form source
- **Follow-up**: Auto-Calendly, SMS, or email sequences

---

**ROI**:

- **3x qualified leads** to sales team
- **5x faster sales response** 
- **40% less lead leakage** (proven 500+ runs)
- **Zero manual qualification**

---

**Need help customizing?**: 
Contact me for consulting and support: [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/milobravo/) / [Message](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB) 

---

**Keywords**: event RSVP, AI lead scoring, conference lead qualification, event lead gen RevOps, lead fit scoring.

Log to Event RSVP AI Leads Sheet

parameters.content:
## Was this helpful? Get in touch! 

[![clic](https://vptkuqoipqbebipqjnqw.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/Milo%20Bravo/seeAxWUupcOOXY5tntexZ_video.gif)](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)

I really hope this automation helped you. Your feedback is incredibly valuable and helps me create better resources for business and the n8n community.

### **Have Feedback, a Question, or a Project Idea?**

I've streamlined the way we connect. It all starts with one simple form that takes less than 10 seconds. After that, you'll chat with my AI assistant who will gather the key details and pass them directly on to me.

####  **[Start the conversation here](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)** 

*   **Give Feedback:** Share your thoughts on this template—whether you found a typo, encountered an unexpected error, have a suggestion, or just want to say thanks!

*   **n8n Consulting:** Have a complex business challenge or need a custom workflow built from scratch? Let's partner on a powerful automation solution tailored to your specific needs.

*   **Join your team:** We can work together to get you launched with confidence. 

---

Happy Automating!
[Milo Bravo](https://linkedin.com/in/MiloBravo/) | BRaiA Labs | Automation & BI Systems + AI Integration

## 2. Validate Email

Checks if the email is present and matches a valid format. Invalid submissions are logged to a separate Google Sheets tab for manual review.

## 3. AI Lead Scoring

GPT-4o-mini analyzes the lead profile and returns a structured JSON response with:
- **fitLevel:** High / Medium / Low
- **leadScore:** 0–100
- **nextAction:** Recommended next step
- **reason:** Brief explanation

## 4. Route by Score

Splits the pipeline based on AI lead score:
- **Score ≥ 70** → Qualified lead path (top)
- **Score < 70** → Nurture lead path (bottom)

## 5. Sync to HubSpot

Upserts the contact by email into HubSpot CRM. Stores AI scoring in custom properties:
- `ai_fit_level`, `ai_lead_score`
- `ai_next_action`, `ai_reason`
- `utm_source`

## 6. Slack Notifications

Sends real-time alerts with lead details, score, and a direct HubSpot link:
- **Qualified leads** → #sales channel
- **Nurture leads** → #marketing channel

## 7. Log to Google Sheets

All processed leads are logged to the Event RSVP AI Leads sheet with full input fields, AI scoring results, and timestamp for reporting and analysis.

## RSVP Event Lead Scorer

### **What it does:**
Receives event RSVP submissions via webhook, uses AI to score each lead's ICP fit, routes qualified leads to HubSpot + Slack sales alerts, and logs everything to Google Sheets.

### **Why it matters:**
Automates the entire lead qualification pipeline so your sales team only sees high-value leads, while nurture contacts get routed to marketing — all in real time.

### **How it works:**
- **Step 1**: Webhook receives RSVP data (name, email, company, job title, country)
- **Step 2**: Validates email format; invalid submissions logged to a separate sheet
- **Step 3**: GPT-4o-mini scores ICP fit (0–100), returns fit level, next action, and reasoning
- **Step 4**: Score ≥ 70 → upserts qualified contact in HubSpot + alerts #sales in Slack
- **Step 5**: Score < 70 → upserts nurture contact in HubSpot + alerts #marketing in Slack
- Step 6: All processed leads logged to Google Sheets with AI scoring results

### **Setup steps:**
1. Set **HubSpot Portal URL**, **qualified threshold**, and **Slack channel IDs** in the **Set Workflow Variables** node
2. Set the **Google Sheets IDs** for Invalid Submissions and Event RSVP AI Leads sheets
3. Connect **Google Sheets OAuth2** credential
4. Connect **OpenAI API** credential (GPT-4o-mini)
5. Connect **HubSpot** credential
6. Connect **Slack OAuth2** credential
7. Create custom HubSpot properties: `ai_fit_level`, `ai_lead_score`, `ai_next_action`, `ai_reason`, `utm_source`
8. Test: POST sample RSVP JSON to the webhook URL → verify full pipeline

## 1. Trigger & Configuration

Webhook receives event RSVP POST requests. The Set node configures workflow-level variables: HubSpot portal URL, qualified lead threshold, and Slack channel IDs.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
